caption: An older man with white hair and a white beard, wearing a light-colored Nehru jacket over a white shirt, stands behind a wooden podium and speaks. He is positioned in front of a textured green stone wall with geometric recessed patterns. To his right is a tall, cylindrical glass column containing pink floral arrangements. Two thin black microphones extend from the podium toward him. As he speaks, he uses his hands to gesture; in the initial moments, his hands are positioned low near the microphones, then he raises his right hand to emphasize a point, and finally, his hands move in a fluid motion as he continues his address. The camera remains stationary throughout the sequence, focusing on the man from the waist up as he delivers his speech in a formal setting.
